markdown:
#  Add a User to Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
  * Assigning a user as a bid contact means that they are notified and can respond to bid invitations made to your company in Procore.
  * For more information about permissions levels, see [How do permissions work for free Procore accounts?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-permissions-work-for-free-procore-accounts)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Team** page.  
_Note:_ If you haven't added any team members yet, an 'Invite Your Team' section is also shown on the Home page with a **Go to Team** button.
  3. Click **Add User**.
  4. Complete the form.
  5. When you are ready to invite the user, click **Send Invite**.


## See Also
  * [Assign a User as a Bid Contact in Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/assign-a-user-as-a-bid-contact-in-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Accept or Deny a User's Request to Join Your Free Procore Company Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/accept-or-deny-a-users-request-to-join-your-free-procore-company-account)
  * [Free Procore Account - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)
title: Add a User to Your Free Procore Account
description: How to invite users to your team in a free Procore account.
